description: The image is a photograph of a rural landscape under a clear, light blue sky with faint white clouds in the upper left. The foreground features a gentle slope covered in dry, yellowish-green grassland or agricultural field, with a leafy green branch of a tree or shrub visible in the bottom-left. Beyond this, the landscape consists of rolling hills extensively covered by fields in varying shades of green and yellowish-green, suggesting a mix of pasture, grassland (GRA), or agricultural land. Several clusters of dark green deciduous trees are distributed across the hills; a prominent group is in the mid-left, another larger group is in the mid-right, and a distinct linear row of trees (Small Woody Features, SWF) runs vertically up the slope on the far right. Smaller clumps of trees are also visible along the distant horizon line. The overall impression is a sunny day in a natural or semi-natural environment.
